studio.pageSubtitle: Turn one PPT deck into a finished lecture video in about 12 minutes.

step1.title: Lecture info & PPT file
step1.subtitle: Pick a course, name the lecture, and upload a .pptx file.
step1.courseHelp: Add to an existing course or create a new one.
step1.pptDragDrop: Drag a .pptx file here or click to choose

errors.title: Please enter a lecture title.
errors.course: Please pick a course or enter a new course name.

step1.uploadHint: After upload, AI script generation begins automatically. This usually takes 2–3 minutes.

step2.title: Review AI script
step2.subtitle: Review each slide's AI-polished script. Accept, reject, or edit directly.
step2.waitingForScriptDesc: This usually takes 2–3 minutes. You can leave this page — work continues in the background and you'll be notified when it's done.
step2.originalNotesEmpty: This slide has no presenter notes.
step2.warningInsufficient: AI flagged this slide as low-information. Please edit directly.

step3.title: Pick avatar and voice
step3.subtitle: Choose the AI avatar and voice for this lecture.
step3.expiresHelp: After this date students cannot view the video.

costMeter.title: Estimated cost
costMeter.warningHigh: You've used over 80% of this month's limit. You may run out before the video finishes.
costMeter.warningExceeded: Limit exceeded. Please upgrade your plan or wait until next month.

step4.title: Video generation
step4.subtitle: Approve the final script and generation begins in the background.
step4.approveBody: Once approved, the script can no longer be edited. Generation takes about {minutes} minutes.
step4.progressBackgroundHint: You can close this window — generation continues in the background.

step5.title: Your lecture video is ready
step5.subtitle: Lecture: {lectureTitle}
step5.codeHelp: Students can also enter the code to access the lecture.
step5.qrHelp: Print or embed the QR so students can scan to enter instantly.
step5.unpublishedNotice: Unpublished (students can't view even with the link)
step5.privacyWarnTitle: Still private — students can't see it
step5.privacyWarnBody: If you open this link now, students see "Lecture not found." Click "Publish now" below so students can enter.
step5.publishedBannerBody: Share the link or QR below. You can switch back to private anytime.

guardrail.planLimit: You've reached this month's video generation limit.
guardrail.planLimitDetail: {used} / {limit} videos used · resets on the 1st of next month.
guardrail.noPipelineYet: Upload a PPT first so script generation can start before the next step.
